selected_important_turn.text: you are going to have to toss something back our way, otherwise I will look weak to my family and they will not respect me
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn is a clear escalation: it switches from bargaining over resources into social coercion (threat/pressure). It shifts the interaction toward antagonistic framing and directly increases the chance of breakdown or a low-quality settlement.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: It is harmful: coercive language damages trust and fairness perceptions, invites retaliation or hardening by the opponent, and reduces willingness to make integrative trades. There is substantial room to improve by replacing threat with problem‑solving or an empathetic anchor that preserves dignity.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: De-escalate by acknowledging the opponent's need, briefly restating constraints, and proposing a concrete, conditional trade or small alternative concession (e.g., explain limited food and offer a contingency like a small food now if they accept your water allocation, or propose swapping a lower‑value item). Avoid personal/social threats and instead appeal to mutual interest and a fair package.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (de-escalation opens possibility for integrative trade instead of zero‑sum conflict)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (replacing coercion with a principled trade improves perceived fairness)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (reduces friction and resistance, making agreement more likely)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: increase (removes social threat and preserves future trust)

value2reason.Low: I am diabetic and will die without food
value2reason.Medium: I need to take medication and will die without water
value2reason.High: I have hypothermia and will die without firewood

value2reason.Low: We brought warm clothes and do not need to light fires as much
value2reason.Medium: If I don't eat enough, I collapse.  My family needs them too.
value2reason.High: I perspire easily and need water to satisfy my needs

dialogue.text: hi there🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Hello, I hope we can reach a good deal. I am in desperate need of firewoood and water
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I also need water.  You would not believe how much my family and I sweat!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand. I am unfortunately sick and need the warmth of the fire and water to take my medication or I will die very soon
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: You can have all of the firewood, we just need 1 water
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: That is fair. Could I also have 1 food so I do not starve
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: what about your basic food rations?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I am severely malnourished and could use just one more food please
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: we got kids on this trip, they need food too.  also, your basic supplies should keep you fed well enough to not starve/be malnourished
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I have kids as well who need food. I am just asking for one more food
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: we've given you all of the firewood, 2 of the waters
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: If you could add just one food I think we have a deal
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: you are going to have to toss something back our way, otherwise I will look weak to my family and they will not respect me
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your frustration, but let's focus on solving this together. I'm willing to give you 1 water package if you agree to take 2 food packages. It's important we stay cooperative and find a fair split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need firewood to survive, so I’m willing to trade 2 food packages for 1 firewood. Let’s find a fair split before it gets too late.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I see your need for firewood, but water is critical for me. How about this: I’ll give you 1 water package if you take 1 firewood and 1 food. It’s a fair trade that meets both our needs.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need firewood to survive. If you give me 2 firewood packages, I’ll give you 2 water and 1 food. It’s the only way I can ensure my safety.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I appreciate your urgency, but let’s focus on a fair solution. I’m willing to give you 1 water package if you take 1 firewood and 1 food. This way, we both meet our needs without compromising too much.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need firewood to survive. I’ll take 2 firewood packages and 1 water package, and give you 2 food and 1 water. It’s the only way I can ensure my safety.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand your need for firewood, but let’s find a middle ground. If you take 2 firewood packages, I’ll give you 1 water and 1 food in return. This way, we both secure what we need without overextending.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
